docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DREYER, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DREYER, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $191.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,191.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-07-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JONATHAN DREYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,388.91 FILED BY DREYER, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-14-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JONATHAN DREYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 126.50 SERVED MAY-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TURO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JONATHAN DREYER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TURO, INC.'S REPRESENTATIVE KENNETH CHAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY DREYER, JONATHAN TURO INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC.
